mapper.sql: id, weight_config_id, category_id, enable_weight, custom_min_weight, custom_max_weight, weight_coefficient, description, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM category_weight_rules WHERE weight_config_id = #{weightConfigId} ORDER BY category_id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO category_weight_rules (weight_config_id, category_id, enable_weight, custom_min_weight, custom_max_weight, weight_coefficient, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.weightConfigId}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.enableWeight}, #{item.customMinWeight}, #{item.customMaxWeight}, #{item.weightCoefficient}, #{item.description}, NOW(), NOW())
